message:
test(fcp-conformance/symbol-envelope): pin AAD + nonce binding for encrypt_symbol/decrypt_symbol (br-2qkn0)

symbol_envelope is the per-symbol AEAD layer in FCPS frames
(FCP_Specification_V3.md §9.8.1). Its AAD binds ciphertext to the
SymbolContext (object_id, zone_key_id, epoch_id, sender, ...) and its
nonce derives from (frame_seq, esi). It had zero conformance coverage.
A regression that dropped a SymbolContext field from the AAD or nonce
derivation would silently allow cross-object/cross-epoch/cross-frame
replay of encrypted symbols.

Adds 10 tests against the public fcp_protocol::symbol_envelope API:

- chacha_round_trip_recovers_plaintext
- xchacha_round_trip_recovers_plaintext
- wrong_zone_key_decrypt_fails
- tampered_object_id_in_aad_decrypt_fails
- tampered_zone_key_id_in_aad_decrypt_fails (key-rotation defense)
- tampered_epoch_id_in_aad_decrypt_fails (epoch-replay defense)
- wrong_frame_seq_decrypt_fails_via_nonce_binding (per-frame replay)
- wrong_esi_decrypt_fails_via_nonce_binding (in-frame reposition)
- chacha_ciphertext_does_not_decrypt_under_xchacha (algorithm
  cross-rejection)
- flipped_auth_tag_byte_decrypt_fails (tag positional integrity)

All 10 pass locally in <0.01s via cargo test -p fcp-conformance --test
session_symbol_envelope_conformance.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
